action_items: MINOR: The test requirement mentions /solutions/smart-lighting but this slug doesn't exist. The correct slug is 'lighting-automation'. Either: (1) seed 'smart-lighting' as a solution, or (2) update documentation to use correct slug '/solutions/lighting-automation'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dynamic [slug] routes for solutions and services confirmed working with benchmark design. 41 static solution pages and 7 static service pages were deleted - all now handled by dynamic routes. Note: '/solutions/smart-lighting' returns 404 because the correct slug is 'lighting-automation'. All services tested work correctly. Geo pages regression passed.
